sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { BarChart, Bar, LineChart, Line, PieChart, Pie, Cell, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, Legend, ResponsiveContainer } from 'recharts'; import { getDashboardStats, getAgentPerformance, getRecentActivity } from '../services/api'; const KPI_DATA = [ { label: 'Total Tickets', value: '248', trend: '+12% this month', up: true, dark: true }, { label: 'Resolved', value: '189', trend: '+8% this month', up: true, green: true }, { label: 'Pending', value: '42', trend: '-5% this month', up: false, orange: true }, { label: 'Avg Response', value: '28m', trend: '-3 min this month', up: true }, { label: 'SLA Compliance', value: '94%', trend: '+2% this month', up: true }, { label: 'Chatbot Resolved', value: '312', trend: '+24% this month', up: true }, ]; const BAR_DATA = [ { month: 'Nov', Raised: 35, Resolved: 30 }, { month: 'Dec', Raised: 45, Resolved: 32 }, { month: 'Jan', Raised: 48, Resolved: 45 }, { month: 'Feb', Raised: 45, Resolved: 33 }, { month: 'Mar', Raised: 58, Resolved: 55 }, { month: 'Apr', Raised: 47, Resolved: 40 }, ]; const LINE_DATA = [ { month: 'Nov', SLA: 84 }, { month: 'Dec', SLA: 87 }, { month: 'Jan', SLA: 92 }, { month: 'Feb', SLA: 93 }, { month: 'Mar', SLA: 93 }, { month: 'Apr', SLA: 87 }, ]; const CAT_DATA = [ { name: 'Software', value: 98, color: '#1DB954' }, { name: 'Network', value: 72, color: '#f59e0b' }, { name: 'Hardware', value: 54, color: '#ef4444' }, { name: 'Other', value: 24, color: '#8b5cf6' }, ]; const PRI_DATA = [ { name: 'High', value: 67, color: '#ef4444' }, { name: 'Medium', value: 112, color: '#f59e0b' }, { name: 'Low', value: 69, color: '#1DB954' }, ]; const HBAR_DATA = [ { category: 'Network', minutes: 28 }, { category: 'Hardware', minutes: 42 }, { category: 'Software', minutes: 22 }, { category: 'Other', minutes: 35 }, ]; const AGENTS = [ { initials: 'AC', name: 'Alex Chen', rank: '#1 this month', color: '#1DB954', resolved: 52, avgTime: '24 min', rating: 4.8 }, { initials: 'SK', name: 'Sarah Kim', rank: '#2 this month', color: '#3b82f6', resolved: 48, avgTime: '31 min', rating: 4.6 }, { initials: 'MT', name: 'Mike Torres', rank: '#3 this month', color: '#8b5cf6', resolved: 45, avgTime: '28 min', rating: 4.7 }, { initials: 'PP', name: 'Priya Patel', rank: '#4 this month', color: '#f59e0b', resolved: 38, avgTime: '22 min', rating: 4.9 }, ]; const ACTIVITY = [ { icon: '🔵', bg: 'bg-blue-50', title: 'New ticket raised', tid: 'TKT-008', time: '2 min ago' }, { icon: '🟡', bg: 'bg-amber-50', title: 'Assigned to Alex Chen', tid: 'TKT-007', time: '15 min ago' }, { icon: '🟢', bg: 'bg-green-light', title: 'Ticket resolved', tid: 'TKT-006', time: '32 min ago' }, { icon: '⚪', bg: 'bg-gray-50', title: 'Status updated to In Progress', tid: 'TKT-005', time: '1 hr ago' }, { icon: '🟢', bg: 'bg-green-light', title: 'Ticket resolved', tid: 'TKT-004', time: '2 hr ago' }, ]; export default function AdminDashboard() { // In production, replace with: useEffect(() => { getDashboardStats().then(...) }, []); return (
